long_description:

TIP Situation: Observed smt create failure
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-share:us-south-ngdc-test::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone1-zone-control:workloadname:share-mount-target-controller
TIP Short Description: Observed smt create failure

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
